creator: ports@bsdserwis.com
text:
Hello,

On Fri, Dec 30, 2011 at 02:20:18AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of net-mgmt/collectd,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/163709 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/163709
> 
I've checked this patch in my tinderbox and everything passed without
errors. I have one doubt about postinstall:
now there is checking of collectd.conf file which is copied from
collectd.conf.sample.

Your patch turns away this condition: copy collectd.conf to
collectd.conf.sample. Is this correct? For me it makes no sense at all
:-(((

Thanks a lot.

Greetings,
-- 
Krzysztof Stryjek
UNIX administrator/Juniper Networks Specialist
email: wtp (at) bsdserwis (dot) com
